Standardise GPS column names and core types

Source: R/grz_ingest.R
grz_standardise_gps.Rd

Maps input headings to canonical names (sensor_id, datetime, lon, lat), coerces core types, and carries optional metadata columns.

Usage

grz_standardise_gps(
  data,
  colmap = NULL,
  deployment_id = NULL,
  keep_extra = TRUE
)

Arguments

data

Input data frame.

colmap

Optional named character vector mapping canonical names to source column names.

deployment_id

Optional deployment identifier (single value or vector of length nrow(data)).

keep_extra

Logical; keep non-core source columns.

Value

A data.table with canonical GPS columns.
